title: Cliffbranch Large Biomes Addon
description: An add-on pack that makes CliffBranch have large biome distribution
body:
# CliffBranch Large Biomes Addon
Addon for [Cliff under a branch](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cliffbranch) that makes it have large biomes distribution

### Note
It needs to load cliff under a branch to work, since it is just an add-on
